executives.name: Dr. Siva Sivaram
executives.background: Dr. Sivaram has served as our Chief Executive Officer since February 2024 and as a member of our Board since September 2023. Prior to joining QuantumScape, he served as President of Western Digital Corp. from 2020 to 2023 and as Executive Vice President of Silicon Technology from 2016 to 2020. He previously held leadership roles at SanDisk and Matrix Semiconductor.

executives.name: Jagdeep Singh
executives.background: Mr. Singh is a co-founder of QuantumScape and served as our Chief Executive Officer from our inception in 2010 until February 2024. He currently serves as Chairman of the Board. Before QuantumScape, he was the founder and CEO of Infinera Corporation.

executives.name: Kevin Hettrich
executives.background: Mr. Hettrich has served as our Chief Financial Officer since 2018. He joined QuantumScape in 2012 and has held various roles in finance and product management. Prior to QuantumScape, he worked at Bain & Company and the U.S. Department of Energy.

executives.name: Dr. Timothy Holme
executives.background: Dr. Holme is a co-founder of QuantumScape and has served as our Chief Technology Officer since 2010. He holds a Ph.D. in Mechanical Engineering from Stanford University.

executives.name: Michael McCarthy
executives.background: Mr. McCarthy has served as our Chief Legal Officer and Head of Corporate Development since 2013. Previously, he was General Counsel at Infinera Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Jagdeep Singh
board_of_directors.background: Co-founder and former CEO of QuantumScape. Chairman of the Board.

board_of_directors.name: Dr. Siva Sivaram
board_of_directors.background: CEO of QuantumScape. Former President of Western Digital.

board_of_directors.name: Frank Blome
board_of_directors.background: CEO of PowerCo SE, the battery company of Volkswagen Group. He has held various senior positions at Volkswagen AG since 2017.

board_of_directors.name: Brad Buss
board_of_directors.background: Former CFO of SolarCity and Cypress Semiconductor. Serves on the boards of Tesla and Marvell Technology.

board_of_directors.name: Jens Wiese
board_of_directors.background: Head of Group M&A and Investment Advisory at Volkswagen AG. Former Senior Partner at Roland Berger.

board_of_directors.name: Susan Hensey
board_of_directors.background: Former Partner at McKinsey & Company with over 30 years of experience in manufacturing and supply chain.

board_of_directors.name: JB Straubel
board_of_directors.background: Co-founder and CEO of Redwood Materials. Co-founder and former CTO of Tesla.
